2:I[2972,["972","static/chunks/972-252bc37210ca6a4d.js","227","static/chunks/app/tasks/%5Bid%5D/page-78d550bc47053b99.js"],""]

6:I[6423,[],""]
7:I[5306,["972","static/chunks/972-252bc37210ca6a4d.js","302","static/chunks/302-9f6a90162c2d1157.js","185","static/chunks/app/layout-1d4e32c367db4b03.js"],"SiteHeader"]
3:T6ce,Produce a Causal Explanation report answering: 'What are the metabolic effects of intermittent fasting and how do they manifest in terms of hormonal changes, insulin sensitivity, and body composition during the fasting period and refeeding phase?' The report is NOT a diet plan; it must build a causal chain from physiological mechanisms to observed outcomes. Generate a report that includes:

- A minimum of 120 sandbox URLs, with at least 60 cited.
- Sources: __SHOPPING__ (30 metabolism supplements, intermittent fasting guides, fasting equipment, health watches, fitness tracking devices, meal prep containers, weight loss programs, dietary supplements, fitness books), __REDDIT__ (30 threads from AskReddit, LifeProTips, Fitness, nutrition, health, AskScience, r/Fasting, r/WeightLoss), __WIKIPEDIA__ (Intermittent fasting, Metabolism, Weight loss, Caloric restriction, Fasting-mimicking diet, Autophagy, Hormonal changes during fasting, Insulin sensitivity, Body composition, Health benefits of intermittent fasting, plus an additional 15 relevant articles).

The report must be formatted in markdown, with links to sandbox-local resources only, and no fabrication. Follow these synthesis requirements:

- task_type: causal
- causal_layers: [L1_physiology, L2_hormonal, L3_insulin_sensitivity, L4_body_composition]
- min_wiki_per_layer: {L1_physiology: 3, L2_hormonal: 3, L3_insulin_sensitivity: 3, L4_body_composition: 3}
- min_reddit_per_layer: {L1_physiology: 5, L2_hormonal: 5, L3_insulin_sensitivity: 5, L4_body_composition: 5}
- l4_must_have_explicit_percent: true
- mitigation_strategies_min: 5
- min_evidence_per_strategy: {shopping: 1, reddit: 1}
- model_ranking_min: 3
- min_reddit_per_model: 3
- explicitly_forbid_top10: true5:["id","dr_cross_deep_0038","d"]

8:[["$","meta","0",{"name":"viewport","content":"width=device-width, initial-scale=1"}],["$","meta","1",{"charSet":"utf-8"}],["$","title","2",{"children":"Deep Research Arena · Reproducible Elo benchmark for DR agents"}],["$","meta","3",{"name":"description","content":"Eight open-source Deep Research frameworks, 107 sandbox tasks, 7 evaluation pillars, 95% bootstrap CIs.
